'''Genkal''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[MC80a Star Cruiser]] ''[[Naritus]]'' serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was known as an excellent leader and admired by his crews. He was instrumental in destroying the notorious [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] band, the [[Khuiumin Survivors]]. He was scheduled to step down from command of the ''Naritus'' following the mission to [[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]], and become a flag officer at [[Fleet Command/Legends|Fleet Command]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
